title: これもひとつの愛情表現っ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle has invited us to a day at the
mountain stream. After we meet up with
Matikanetannhauser, the three of us wait for our
train.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see it! But weren't you going to
invite more people?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Everyone had the same story—too busy, maybe
next time, yadda yadda. It's a right shame... But
having you two here is more than enough!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I'm glad to hear it. Maybe next time we
could all go camping! And there's always the
Tracen Academy Summer Walk too.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's right! There's so many fun events ahead!
We could cut a rug 'round the campfire!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Just something the academy organizes for
summer! They do a bunch to help us all relax!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
They even pay for some of our travel! So let's
take this chance to relax our tails off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The academy also runs a training camp in the
summer. It's a hectic season for the students, so
these pockets of respite are all the more
important.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, the train's here! Onward ho, to the stream we
go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm all done changing! Woohoo, the water's all
sparkly!
Ugyah! Not to mention freezing! Brrr!

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser and Taiki
text_block_list.text: 'Kaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pair frolic in the water and pick berries with
childish delight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching them play, I'm reminded of the hugging
dilemma from before. I wonder if
Matikanetannhauser has already resolved it.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't the water feel just grand? The current's as
smooth as all get-out!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whoa! It gets really deep over here! Be careful!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hmm!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's bracing against the current. It's not exactly
a hug, but it might work as practice for one. Or
maybe this is the result of her training?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Do you hear that adorable chirp—oh no!
That baby chick fell out of its nest!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
We have to save it! Oh, but I remember hearing
that if you touch a chick, the parents will
abandon it because your smell got on it...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But still! We can't just leave that poor birdie all
alone! The little thing needs to go home!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hey! Taiki?!
choice_data_list: It's not safe! Let me do it!
It's not safe! Let me do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can stop her, Taiki Shuttle is climbing the
tree, baby bird in her arms.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She makes good progress at first, but she loses
her footing midway and comes to a halt.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whoops! I was so busy mindin' the little one I
plumb forgot to look at my feet!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...
Just keep still for a moment!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It looks like the closest stable foothold from
where you're at is... Ah, actually, that spot might
be rotten...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
In that case... I think this spot might be able to
hold your toes... Yeah, judging by the diameter, it
should be deep enough. And from there...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Okay, I think I've got it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Move your left foot down and to the right about
twelve centimeters! You'll be backtracking a
little, but don't worry. After that, take your right
foot and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Matikanetannhauser's precise
directions, Taiki Shuttle makes it to the nest
safely. And then...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeehaw, we did it! Thanks a ton, Tannhauser! The
little chicky made it home safe and sound!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thank you so much, Taiki!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and the mom's back in the nest too! I guess
she was keeping watch nearby the whole time! It
looks like she's got no problem, thankfully!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Phew! That's a relie—whoa!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Taiki!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle briefly loses her balance, and
Matikanetannhauser shoots up the tree to
support her. They slowly make their way back
down.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I owe you one! I was really flailing there.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Are you hurt?! You must've been so scared!
Ohhhhh, I'm so glad you're safe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser hugs Taiki Shuttle tight. She
must really have been worried.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Thank goodness...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Tannhauser... You've got such a warm heart!
I'm so happy right now!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I can feel the worry and love just shootin' off you!
Sorry for giving you a fright, but thanks for saving
me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
(I get it. Thinking of others, worrying about them,
and trying to help them... They're all ways to show
your love. Have I finally gotten my feelings
across?)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehehehe, I get it now. There are a lot of ways to
show your love.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And thank you too, Trainer! Don't think I didn't
see you down there with your arms out, ready to
break our fall!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I would've rather gone unnoticed, seeing as I
didn't actually help anything...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh! Does that count as showing love too?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It sure does! Love and peace make the world go
round! Get over here! This one's a group hug!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to hold my ground against their
hug—which is more of a tackle—we fall into the
stream with a huge splash.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Sorry 'bout that, Trainer! I really had you worried
back there, didn't I? Here's a hug to calm you
down!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me you're embarrassed? You are! I told you that we need hugging practice!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Did you say hugging practice? Say no more! I can
give y'all hugs 'til the cows come home!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to explain that I'm not actually embarrassed,
but in the face of the two grinning Umamusume,
it proves to be futile.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Sorry 'bout that, Trainer! I really had you worried
back there, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask her not to do anything dangerous in the
future. I don't even want to think about if
anything bad were to happen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Exactly! Geez, you had us both worried sick!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"That goes for you too," I mutter with a sigh, but I
ultimately keep it to myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"That goes for you too," I mutter with a sigh, but I
ultimately keep it to myself.
